serverInfo.name: timeline-pulse
serverInfo.title: Timeline Pulse — timeline-shift folklore, filed and graded
serverInfo.description: Search timeline-shift folklore, Mandela Effect reports, and collider-era myth as a source-graded cultural archive. Read-only, local-first, no auth.

tools.name: timeline_search_reports
tools.description: Search reports by text, motif, source type, date, stance, or grade.

tools.name: timeline_get_report
tools.description: Full record for one report id, with claims and safety labels.

tools.name: timeline_mandela_catalog
tools.description: Memory variants with community + mainstream notes.

tools.name: timeline_motif_map
tools.description: Motif constellation as nodes + weighted edges.

tools.name: timeline_compare_sources
tools.description: Belief / neutral / skeptic framings + shared facts.

tools.name: timeline_agent_manifest
tools.description: Corpus rules and safe language. Call first.
